personal.name: Shaon Ahmed
personal.title: Lead Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Designing Scalable Digital Solutions with Backend Excellence, System Architecture & Performance-Driven Engineering
personal.bio:
I’m a Software Engineer specializing in designing and building large-scale, high-performance distributed systems. My focus is backend engineering with PHP and JavaScript, along with event-driven architectures using Kafka, RabbitMQ, and modern microservices patterns. I build systems that are engineered for scale, resilience, and real-world production constraints.

Currently, I work on AI-integrated backend platforms and intelligent automation systems, architecting infrastructure that supports complex workflows, high throughput, and low-latency APIs. I actively work on system optimization, scalability improvements, and production-grade reliability in high-demand environments.

My engineering approach is rooted in clean architecture, domain-driven design, and distributed system principles. I care deeply about correctness, performance, observability, and building systems that don’t break under pressure. I don’t just build features—I design systems that scale globally.

I operate in environments where engineering excellence is non-negotiable: ownership, high accountability, and continuous technical evolution.

I’m especially focused on:

• Distributed systems & backend architecture at scale
• Event-driven and asynchronous processing systems
• AI-powered backend infrastructure and automation
• Performance engineering and system optimization
• Building production systems with real-world reliability constraints

“High-performance systems are not built—they are engineered, tested under pressure, and continuously refined.”
personal.quote: Great software is not just written, it’s engineered with purpose. Simplicity and scalability define its true strength.

highlights: Managed team delivery and mentored software engineers
Built a microservices-based manpower platform using distributed system architecture
Designed AI-integrated APIs for workflow automation
Reduced API latency by around 40% through caching and query optimization
Managed SaaS billing software with a focus on automation
Maintained microservices-based ERP systems for ecommerce and local businesses
Automated logistics-related services and billing workflows
Implemented payment gateway integrations and client payment automation
Maintained applications and delivered new features from client requirements
Contributed to leading OTT platforms in Bangladesh
Developed a translation manager for multi-language content
Built robust APIs for seamless user experiences
Developed a loyalty program service
Built admin panels with Livewire and Alpine.js Flux UI for efficient operations
Contributed to the FundedNext platform serving global users with scalable backend systems
Designed and maintained low-latency, secure, and reliable REST APIs
Implemented payout logic that reduced processing time by around 35%
Collaborated with frontend teams to ship seamless API integrations
Optimized queries and backend logic for high-load performance
Led development of multiple applications from scratch using Laravel and the JavaScript ecosystem
Managed full project lifecycle including architecture, development, deployment, and optimization
Designed scalable databases and backend systems aligned with business goals
Improved platform performance and supported around 15-20% business growth
Mentored junior developers and enforced clean code and SOLID principles
Developed Laravel and JavaScript applications from scratch
Contributed to Hyip Max, a top-selling CodeCanyon product
Built backend APIs, business logic, and scalable database structures
Integrated multiple payment gateways for secure transaction workflows
Optimized application performance and database queries
